style_effects: Gentle, iridescent fairy dust particles drift upward in slow, delicate spirals around Hitmonlee, each particle refracting soft pastel hues of pink and lavender. A delicate, petal-shaped aura glows with a warm, pearlescent white light, pulsing gently like a lullaby, while the faint shimmer of musical note vibrations creates a subtle, harmonic ripple in the air. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
